LanguageData.VFES_Frontier.description: A hardy industrial culture common among rimworld settlers.
LanguageData.VFES_Frontier.label: frontier
LanguageData.VFEM2_Feudal.description: A harsh feudal culture of medieval people.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Feudal.label: feudal
LanguageData.VFEM2_FeudalGuild.description: A harsh feudal culture of medieval people.
LanguageData.VFEM2_FeudalGuild.label: feudal
LanguageData.VFEM2_Vikings.description: A harsh norse culture common among the vikings.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Vikings.label: vikings
